title: Bank of India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Bank of India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of India! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of India:
Bank of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India!
